action.reasoning: Starting fresh. I'll build a deepfake detector using wav2vec2-xls-r-300m as backbone with a classification head. Key design choices: (1) weighted loss for class imbalance, (2) mean pooling over time, (3) simple MLP head. I'll train for 5 epochs first to get a baseline and measure iteration time.
